response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but his experience is primarily in full-stack and web/mobile development rather than the specialized hardware, SoC, or AI accelerator optimization required for this role. While he has worked with performance-critical systems and low-latency applications, the alignment with the role's core responsibilities is limited.
strengths: Extensive experience with performance-critical systems (e.g., low-latency apps at Sociomantic, real-time data processing).
Diverse technical background, including embedded systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and open-source contributions.
Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship skills (TDD, CI/CD, functional programming).
concerns: Lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator optimization, or GPU architecture.
No evident background in SIMD/MIMD architectures or deep neural network training/inference optimization.
Mostly web/mobile/full-stack development experience, with limited focus on hardware-software co-design.
